nodes.context: Various criminal organizations based in Serbia or composed of ethnic Serbs, involved in smuggling, trafficking, assassinations, etc.
Italian organized crime group that purchased heroin from Serbian clans and smuggled it to the US.
Serbian cartel that imports about 500 tons of cocaine annually to Europe.
Serbian criminal group responsible for some of the biggest heists ever committed.

Italian organized crime group, ousted from drug market by Šarić gang in 2008-2009.
Serbian mafia organization closely linked to the state, led by Veljko Belivuk, active since 2013.
Gangs organized in different Blokovi of New Belgrade, active since 1992.
Serbian mafia group involved in car thefts, smuggling, narcotics, active 1989-1999.

Serbian mafia group involved in drug trafficking, active since 1991.
Serbian mafia group known for drug trafficking and racketeering, active until 2004.
Serbian mafia group and international drug cartel, originated in 1970s, operates globally.
Irish-American organized crime gang in Hell's Kitchen, New York.
American Mafia family, linked to Group America via Boško Radonjić.
FBI term for a loose-knit network of criminals from former Yugoslavia, active in New York.
Criminal group involved in burglaries in New York, later evolved into Pink Panthers.
International jewel thief network responsible for audacious thefts worldwide.
Serbian criminal group active until 1992.
Criminal network led by Arkan, active until his death in 2000.
Serbian criminal group active until 2009.

One of the most powerful crime groups in Serbia's history, subject of a docudrama series.
Criminal organization involved in smuggling marijuana with Serbs in the UK.
Criminal group that has operated in London.
Irish-American organized crime group led by Boško Radonjić, a Serb.
American Mafia family; John Gotti was boss from 1988 to 1992.

edges.evidence_quote: During this period, the Serbian Mafia as the various clans took to referring to themselves forged an alliance with the Sicilian Mafia who purchased the heroin from the Serb clans and smuggled the heroin onward to the United States and other nations in the New World.
edges.context: Serbian mafia forged an alliance with Sicilian Mafia for heroin smuggling.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2010 it was revealed that the Šarić gang had, from 2008 to 2009, ousted the 'Ndrangheta from the drug market.
edges.context: Šarić gang ousted 'Ndrangheta from the drug market, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: The group originated in the 1970s, when Serbian nationalist Boško "The Yugo" Radonjić emigrated from Yugoslavia to the United States and joined the Westies
edges.context: Group America's founder joined the Westies, indicating structural origin.

edges.evidence_quote: He also maintained links with the Gambino crime family and its boss, John Gotti.
edges.context: Group America's founder maintained links with the Gambino family, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: The YACS group has also been recruited as an "enforcement arm" for American Mafia crime families.
edges.context: YACS served as an enforcement arm for American Mafia families, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: Interpol believes that the YACS Crime Group that evolved into The PINK PANTHERS are responsible for US$ 130 million in bold robberies
edges.context: YACS evolved into Pink Panthers.

edges.evidence_quote: In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples
edges.context: Zemun clan member worked for the Camorra.

edges.evidence_quote: an international drug trafficking operation involving the Bari-based Parisi-Palermiti clan, the 'Ndrangheta, and Serbian criminal networks has been thwarted
edges.context: Parisi-Palermiti clan and 'Ndrangheta cooperated in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The Parisi-Palermiti clan had established direct contacts with Serbian traffickers
edges.context: Parisi-Palermiti clan cooperated with Serbian traffickers (Zemun clan).

edges.evidence_quote: an international drug trafficking operation involving the Bari-based Parisi-Palermiti clan, the 'Ndrangheta, and Serbian criminal networks has been thwarted
edges.context: 'Ndrangheta cooperated with Serbian criminal networks (Zemun clan) in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Ljubomir Magaš ... was killed by ... Goran Vuković 'Majmun', a member of the Vozdovac clan
edges.context: Vozdovac clan member killed Ljuba Zemunac gang leader.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, a member of the Chinese Triad was killed after a debt to the Serbian Mafia.
edges.context: Chinese Triad member killed due to debt to Serbian Mafia (Zemun clan).

edges.evidence_quote: On 2 June 2009, six Serbs were convicted, together with several Israelis, in smuggling of 12.5 ton (£36m) marijuana, orchestrated by the Israeli mafia.
edges.context: Serbian mafia members cooperated with Israeli mafia in smuggling marijuana.

edges.evidence_quote: The best known is Boško Radonjić, leader of the Irish-American organized crime group "the Westies", and a trusted enforcer of Gambino family boss John Gotti from 1988 to 1992.
edges.context: Westies leader Radonjić was an enforcer for Gambino family boss Gotti.
